categories.name: Church Attestation Letter
categories.description: Official letter from a church confirming a member’s active participation, good moral character, and spiritual standing.

requiredFields.label: Church / Ministry Name
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Redeemed Christian Church of God

requiredFields.label: Active Departments / Activities
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Choir member, youth fellowship coordinator

requiredFields.label: Recipient Name / Designation
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., The HR Manager, Admission Officer

requiredFields.label: Recipient Organization Name
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Zenith Bank Plc, University of Ibadan

categories.samplePreview:
REDEEMED CHRISTIAN CHURCH OF GOD
Grace Sanctuary, Lagos

Date: June 15, 2026

To Whom It May Concern,

LETTER OF ATTESTATION FOR MR. JOHN CHIDI OBI

I am writing to attest to the character and active participation of Mr. John Chidi Obi, who has been a dedicated member of our congregation for the past 5 years.

John is a committed member of our choir department and serves diligently in the youth fellowship. Throughout his years in our parish, he has demonstrated high moral standards, integrity, and excellent leadership skills...

Yours faithfully,

___________________
Pastor Enoch Adeboye
Resident Pastor
categories.aiPromptTemplate: Generate a professional church attestation letter. Emphasize the member’s spiritual growth, moral standing, and commitment to church activities like {churchActivities} at {churchName}. Signer is {pastorName}, who holds the title of {pastorTitle}. Reiterate that the applicant, {memberFullName}, is highly recommended.

categories.name: SIWES Completion Letter
categories.description: An official discharge or completion letter for students who finished their Students Industrial Work Experience Scheme (SIWES IT).

requiredFields.label: University / Poly Name
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Federal University of Technology, Minna

categories.samplePreview:
CHEVRON NIGERIA LIMITED
12 General Buhari Way, Lekki, Lagos

Date: June 13, 2026

The Coordinator,
SIWES Coordinating Unit,
Federal University of Technology, Minna.

Dear Sir/Ma,

SIWES COMPLETION LETTER FOR AMINA YUSUF (ENG/2021/045)

We hereby write to certify that Amina Yusuf, a student of Mechanical Engineering, completed her 6-month industrial attachment under the Students Industrial Work Experience Scheme (SIWES) at Chevron Nigeria Limited from January 3, 2026, to June 12, 2026.

During her stay with us, she was placed under our Systems Engineering unit and showed exceptional dedication...

Yours faithfully,

___________________
Engr. Tunde Bakare
Lead Systems Engineer
categories.aiPromptTemplate: Write a professional SIWES Completion Letter certifying that {studentName} with Matric No {matricNo} from {institutionName} (Department of {department}) completed industrial training at {companyName} from {startDate} to {endDate}. The supervisor {supervisorName} ({supervisorTitle}) should praise the student’s work ethic, technical progress, and core projects completed.

categories.name: Internship Completion/Discharge Letter
categories.description: Official document given to an intern upon successful completion of their internship program with an organization.

requiredFields.label: Notable Achievements or Projects
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Rebuilt the primary dashboard user interface, fixed responsive bugs

categories.samplePreview:
FLUTTERWAVE TECHNOLOGIES
Lagos, Nigeria

To Whom It May Concern,

LETTER OF INTERNSHIP DISCHARGE & RECOMMENDATION

This is to certify that David Alao worked as a Frontend Web Developer Intern at Flutterwave Technologies for a period of 3 Months...

During his internship, David contributed actively to our core team in rebuilding the primary dashboard UI...

Sincerely,

___________________
Chioma Adeleke
Head of People & Culture
categories.aiPromptTemplate: Generate an internship completion letter from {companyName} signed by {hrName} ({hrTitle}) certifying that {internName} successfully concluded their internship as a {internRole} for {duration}. Mention the notable contributions: {contributions}.

categories.name: Student Introduction Letter
categories.description: Letter written by a school/institution introducing a student to a third party (e.g., for research, visa application, or industrial studies).

requiredFields.label: Purpose of Introduction
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Fieldwork research on metropolitan transport systems at Lagos State Transit Authority

categories.samplePreview:
UNIVERSITY OF LAGOS
Office of the Dean of Student Affairs

Date: June 13, 2026

To Whom It May Concern,

LETTER OF INTRODUCTION: CHARLES OKAFOR (180405112)

We write to introduce the bearer, Charles Okafor, a bona fide final year student of the Department of Sociology, University of Lagos...

He is conducting historical academic fieldwork as part of his research requirements. We would appreciate any assistance and access granted to him...

Dean of Student Affairs
Prof. Olayinka Adebayo
categories.aiPromptTemplate: Draft a Student Introduction Letter from {schoolName} signed by {schoolOfficerName} ({schoolOfficerTitle}). Introduce {studentName}, matriculation number {matricNo}, a student in {department} ({level}). Explain that the purpose is: {purpose}. Request that the recipient accord them necessary assistance cooperation.

categories.name: Character Reference Letter
categories.description: Personal or educational testimony from a lecturer, community leader, or mentor attesting to an applicant’s moral standing and qualities.

requiredFields.label: Referee Title/Organization
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Senior Lecturer, Department of History

requiredFields.label: How long have you known them?
Relationship to Applicant
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Academic adviser, former boss, mentor

requiredFields.label: Applicant Key Integrity Qualities
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Honesty, exceptional leadership in student union, highly level headed

requiredFields.label: Recipient Name & Address (Optional)
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Postgraduate Admissions Board, University of Ghana

categories.samplePreview:
Date: June 13, 2026

To Whom It May Concern,

CHARACTER REFERENCE FOR FATIMA IBRAHIM

I am writing to provide my highest personal recommendation and character reference for Fatima Ibrahim. I have known Fatima for the past 4 years in my capacity as her Academic adviser.

Fatima has consistently shown herself to be an individual of sound character, displaying honesty, exceptional leadership in student union, highly level headed...

Sincerely,

___________________
Dr. Chidi Nwosu
Senior Lecturer, Department of History
categories.aiPromptTemplate: Generate a brilliant and sincere Character Reference Letter. Referee is {refereeName} ({refereeTitle}), writing in reference to {applicantName}. They have known the applicant for {durationKnown} as a {relationship}. Discuss their positive qualities such as {qualities} in rich detail.

categories.name: Academic Recommendation Letter
categories.description: Formal academic endorsement from a professor or head of department for admission, scholarship, or study abroad.

requiredFields.label: Academic Designation
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Professor of Biochemistry & Head of Department

requiredFields.label: Target Program / Award
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., MSc in Molecular Biology at Oxford University

requiredFields.label: Key Academic Strengths
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Resourceful lab assistant, amazing thesis defense on plant DNA splicing

categories.samplePreview:
UNIVERSITY OF ILORIN
Department of Biochemistry

Date: June 13, 2026

Dear Admissions Committee,

ACADEMIC RECOMMENDATION LETTER: VICTOR JAMES

I write to offer my enthusiastic recommendation for Victor James, who is applying for the MSc in Molecular Biology at Oxford University...

Victor finished with a First Class Honours (CGPA of 4.82/5.0). His performance in my advanced biochemistry lab classes was exceptional, demonstrating that he is a resourceful lab assistant, and delivered an amazing thesis defense...

Sincerely,

Prof. Sarah Alabi
Professor of Biochemistry & Head of Department
categories.aiPromptTemplate: Write an Academic Recommendation Letter promoting {studentName} for the {targetProgram}. The letter is from {professorName} ({professorTitle}) at {university}. Focus on academic excellence: {studentGrade} and specific strengths/achievements: {academicStrengths}. Keep the language elite and scholarly.

categories.name: Scholarship Application Letter
categories.description: A compelling application or cover letter written by a student to apply for educational funding programs or grants.

requiredFields.label: Scholarship / Grant Title
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., MTN Foundation Science & Technology Scholarship

requiredFields.label: Academic & Career Goals
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., To complete a degree in Artificial Intelligence and develop agricultural tech for West African farms

requiredFields.label: Why do you need this scholarship?
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Coming from a low-income family with retired parents, paying university tuition is extremely challenging

requiredFields.label: Academic Merits & High school results
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., 320 in JAMB, straight As in WAEC mathematics and physics

categories.samplePreview:
Tolani Abiodun
tolani@example.com
Lagos, Nigeria

To the Scholarship Committee,

APPLICATION FOR THE MTN FOUNDATION SCIENCE & TECHNOLOGY SCHOLARSHIP

I am writing to express my eager interest in applying for the prestigious MTN Foundation Science & Technology Scholarship. I believe that my academic record and professional ambitions align directly with the objectives of your program...

My goals include to complete a degree in Artificial Intelligence and develop agricultural tech for West African farms. Coming from a low-income background, this funding is essential...

Sincerely,

Tolani Abiodun
categories.aiPromptTemplate: Generate a highly compelling Scholarship Application Letter for {studentName} applying for the {scholarshipName}. Incorporate their career goals: {academicGoals}, explain financial hardship respectfully: {financialNeed}, and list academic accomplishments: {academicMerits}. Do not sound overly dramatic but rather resilient, ambitious, and well-organized.

categories.name: NYSC Request Letter
categories.description: Official correspondence written regarding National Youth Service Corps (NYSC) deployments, relocations, or request for corps members.

requiredFields.label: Who is writing?
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., The Principal, Resident Doctor, Managing Director

requiredFields.label: Request Type
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Request for Deployment of Corps Members (Math and English Teachers)

requiredFields.label: NYSC State Secretariat Address
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., NYSC State Coordinator, Surulere, Lagos State

requiredFields.label: Specific Requirements / Perks offered
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Seeking 2 English teachers, accommodation of 1-bedroom flat will be provided with N15,000 monthly stipend

categories.samplePreview:
MODEL COLLEGE LEKKI
Lekki Expressway, Lagos

Date: June 13, 2026

The NYSC State Coordinator,
Surulere, Lagos State.

Dear Sir,

REQUEST FOR THE DEPLOYMENT OF CORPS MEMBERS TO MODEL COLLEGE LEKKI

We hereby write to request the deployment of Corps Members for secondary educational tutoring during the upcoming batch...

Specifically, we are in need of instructors for Mathematics and English. To facilitate their service, we guarantee N15,000 monthly stipend and suitable housing accommodation...

Yours faithfully,

Chief Dr. Adekunle Johnson
Principal
categories.aiPromptTemplate: Draft an NYSC Request Letter for {organizationName} signed by {writerName} ({writerRole}). Type of request is {requestType}. Target coordinates: {nyscState}. Incorporate key benefits and parameters: {specificRequirements}. Ensure standard organizational letter format.

categories.name: Admission Appeal Letter
categories.description: Formal letter written by a student appealing a negative admission decision or requesting special case reconsideration.

requiredFields.label: Reasons & New Facts for Appeal
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Miscalculation of UTME JAMB cutoffs, latest WAEC high-grade results came late, exceptional community service record

categories.samplePreview:
Fatima Bello
Lagos, Nigeria

Date: June 13, 2026

The Chairman,
Admissions Committee,
University of Benin.

Dear Sir/Ma,

ADMISSION APPEAL LETTER: FATIMA BELLO (APP-2026-904) FOR LAW

I am writing to formally appeal the recent decision concerning my admission application to study Bachelor of Law (LL.B) at the University of Benin...

While I appreciate the extensive selection process, I would love the board to review new developments, particularly that my corrected WAEC score transcript was delayed...

Sincerely,

Fatima Bello
categories.aiPromptTemplate: Generate an Admission Appeal Letter for student {studentName} with Reference {applicationRef} seeking {targetCourse} at {universityName}. Elaborate on the core grounds for appeal: {reasonsForAppeal}. Maintain a respectful, humble, and persuasive administrative tone.

categories.name: Transfer Request Letter
categories.description: Formal letter requesting a transfer from one department, campus, or course to another within an academic institution.

requiredFields.label: Reasons for seeking transfer
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Excelling in software algorithms classes, clear alignment with my future focus in cloud databases, CGPA is well above requirement

categories.samplePreview:
RUN/CSC/22/1004
Redeemer’s University

The Registrar,
Redeemer’s University.

Dear Sir,

APPLICATION FOR DEPARTMENTAL TRANSFER: PHY TO CSC

I, Kenneth Ndu, a 200Level student in the Department of Physics, hereby apply for a formal transfer to the Department of Computer Science...

I believe my academic performance, particularly my programming classes, confirms my strong compatibility with Computer Science...

Sincerely,

Kenneth Ndu
categories.aiPromptTemplate: Draft a departmental transfer request letter for {studentName} (Matric: {matricNo}) at {schoolName}, moving from {currentDept} to {targetDept}. Focus on academic alignment, specific career passion, and performance metrics: {reasonsForTransfer}.

categories.name: Parent Consent Letter
categories.description: Letter signed by a parent/guardian providing authorization for their child to participate in local/foreign study tours, excursions, or events.

LETTER of PARENTAL CONSENT FOR SAMUEL COLE

Dr. Kolawole Cole
categories.aiPromptTemplate: Draft an official Parent Consent Letter from parent {parentName} authorizing child {childName} to partake in {activity} organized by {schoolName} on {dates}. Include emergency contact {emergencyContact} and a statement of liability release/cooperation.

categories.name: Employment Introduction Letter

requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Visa application support to attend the Global Risk Summit in Germany

STERLING BANK PLC
Marina, Lagos, Nigeria

State that the purpose of the letter is {purposeOfLetter}. Re-verify that their salary/status satisfies corporate trust standards.

categories.name: Project Defense Request Letter
categories.description: Formal letter written by a student or research group to a department to schedule, request approval, or list details for their final research project/thesis defense.

requiredFields.label: Research Project Thesis Title
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Impact of Mobile Money Solutions on Rural Entrepreneurs in Plateau State

categories.samplePreview:
UNIVERSITY OF JOS
Department of Economics

The Head of Department,
Department of Economics,
University of Jos.

Dear Sir,

REQUEST TO SCHEDULE FINAL B.SC. PROJECT DEFENSE

We, Olumide Lawson & Mary Silas, hereby formally submit our completed B.Sc. thesis research titled "Impact of Mobile Money Solutions on Rural Entrepreneurs in Plateau State" for defense evaluation...

Our supervisor, Dr. Sylvester Long, has approved our research draft, and we kindly appeal for a Defense scheduling in Late July 2026...

Collaborators,
Olumide Lawson & Mary Silas
categories.aiPromptTemplate: Write a Project Defense Request Letter for student(s) {studentName} ({matricNo}) at {university} under {department}. The thesis title is {projectTitle}, supervised by {supervisorName}. Request schedule for {preferredDefenseMonth}.

categories.name: Research Approval Request Letter
categories.description: Letter to a Head of Institution, Hospital, or Research Hub asking for formal ethical approval, resource access, or clearance to execute Academic Research.

requiredFields.label: Designation / Affiliation
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Postgraduate PhD Scholar, College of Medicine

requiredFields.label: Full Research Study Title
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Assessing Diabetic Retinopathy prevalence and local laser access limits in South-West Nigeria

requiredFields.label: Resources or Datasets Needed
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Anonymous demographic health databases, diabetic patient surveys, clinic attendance records

requiredFields.label: Data Privacy & Ethics Commitment
requiredFields.placeholder: e.g., Zero names will be logged, strict HIPAA-inspired security measures will be implemented, purely aggregated metrics

categories.samplePreview:
From: Dr. Maryam Bello-Sule
PhD Scholar, College of Medicine

To the Chief Medical Director,
Federal Medical Centre, Abeokuta.

Dear Sir,

APPLICATION FOR ETHICAL CLEARANCE AND DATA ACCESS APPROVAL FOR ACADEMIC RESEARCH

I wish to formally request authorization to execute an academic research at your reputable facility, titled: "Assessing Diabetic Retinopathy prevalence"... 

I would require access to: Anonymous demographic health databases, diabetic patient surveys. To guarantee ethical standards: Zero names will be logged...

With respect,

___________________
Dr. Maryam Bello-Sule
categories.aiPromptTemplate: Write an elite Research Approval Request Letter for researcher {researcherName} ({researcherTitle}) seeking approval from {targetInstitution} to conduct research titled "{researchTitle}". Explicitly outline required datasets/resources: {dataRequired} and the strict ethical compliance standards: {ethicalCommitment}.

categories.aiPromptTemplate: Generate a highly polished administrative Certificate of State of Origin Draft document. Certify that {fullName} ({gender}) hails from {townOrVillage} in {lga} Local Government Area of {state}, Nigeria. documents.title: Church Attestation Letter
documents.content:
ST. LUKE’S CHURCH
12 Church Administrative Road, Plaza District
info@stlukechurch.org | +1 (555) 019-2831

October 24, 2023

The Human Resources Manager
Wavelet Digital Solutions
Tech Hub Plaza, Suite 400
Corporate District

**SUBJECT: LETTER OF ATTESTATION AND RECOMMENDATION FOR MR. NNACHI DESMOND OGBONNIA**

Dear Sir/Ma'am,

It is with great pleasure and a deep sense of responsibility that I write to you on behalf of St. Luke’s Church to highly recommend and attest to the character, integrity, and spiritual standing of Mr. Nnachi Desmond Ogbonnia. 

Mr. Ogbonnia has been an active, dedicated, and registered member of St. Luke’s Church for the past seven (7) years. Throughout this period, we have watched him grow spiritually, consistently demonstrating the virtues of honesty, diligence, humility, and exemplary moral standing. He is a person of unquestionable character who is held in high esteem by both the leadership and the congregation.

In addition to his spiritual commitment, Mr. Ogbonnia has been highly active in service within our church community. Most notably, he has served as a key leader and facilitator in our church’s Computer Science and Technical Ministry. In this capacity, he has selflessly dedicated his professional skills to managing our digital infrastructure, maintaining our administrative systems, and mentoring youth within the community through our computer literacy programs. His commitment to utilizing technology to advance community engagement and operational efficiency has been invaluable to St. Luke's Church.

Based on his excellent track record of service, strong work ethic, and upright moral character, I have no doubt that he will be a tremendous asset to Wavelet Digital Solutions. We fully endorse his endeavors and recommend him to your organization in the highest possible terms.

Should you require any further information regarding his character or his contributions to our community, please do not hesitate to contact our administrative office.

May God bless your organization.

Yours in His Service,

____________________________
**PASTOR JAMES ONYEKA**
Presiding Pastor, St. Luke’s Church
contact@stlukechurch.org | +1 (555) 019-2832
documents.letterheadAddress: P.M.B. 65, Bosso Road, Minna, Niger State, Nigeria

documents.title: LGA State of Origin Draft
documents.content:
```text
                               FEDERAL REPUBLIC OF NIGERIA
                          GOVERNMENT OF ABIA STATE OF NIGERIA
                    UMUAHIA NORTH LOCAL GOVERNMENT AREA SECRETARIAT
                         P.M.B. 7001, UMUAHIA, ABIA STATE, NIGERIA


Our Ref: ABI/12/R/282                                             Date: 24th October, 2023


                         CERTIFICATE OF STATE OF ORIGIN & INDIGENESHIP
                         =============================================

TO WHOM IT MAY CONCERN

This is to certify and attest that the bearer, MR. NNACHI DESMOND OGBONNIA, is a bona 
fide indigene of Umuahia North Local Government Area of Abia State, Federal Republic of 
Nigeria.

Records available to this Local Government Council confirm that:

1. Full Name:               NNACHI DESMOND OGBONNIA
2. Gender:                  MALE
3. Town/Village:            NGWA
4. Autonomous Community:    IHITE
5. Traditional Ruler:       HRH ___________________________________________
6. Local Government Area:   UMUAHIA NORTH
7. State of Origin:         ABIA STATE

He is, therefore, an indigene of Umuahia North Local Government Area and Abia State. 
Consequently, he is entitled to all rights, privileges, and official benefits accorded to 
all indigenes of this Local Government Area and State.

Any assistance rendered to him in respect of this status will be highly appreciated by this 
Local Government Council.



_________________________________
Hon. Anthony Njoku
Authorized Signatory / Liaison Officer
Umuahia North Local Government Area
Abia State, Nigeria.
```
documents.letterheadAddress: P.M.B. 65, Bosso Road, Minna, Niger State, Nigeria

documents.title: SIWES Completion Letter
documents.content:
CHEVRON NIGERIA LIMITED  
2 Chevron Drive, Lekki Peninsula,  
P.M.B. 12825, Lagos,  
Nigeria.  

June 15, 2026  

The SIWES Coordinator,  
Department of Mechanical Engineering,  
School of Infrastructure, Process Engineering and Technology,  
Federal University of Technology, Minna,  
Niger State, Nigeria.  

Dear Sir/Ma,  

**LETTER OF COMPLETION OF STUDENTS INDUSTRIAL WORK EXPERIENCE SCHEME (SIWES)  
RE: AMINA YUSUF (MATRIC NO: ENG/2021/045)**  

We hereby write to certify that **Amina Yusuf**, a student of the Department of Mechanical Engineering, Federal University of Technology, Minna, with Matriculation Number **ENG/2021/045**, has successfully completed her 24-week Students Industrial Work Experience Scheme (SIWES) at Chevron Nigeria Limited. The practical internship commenced on **January 3, 2026**, and was concluded on **June 12, 2026**.  

During the course of her attachment, she was assigned to the Systems Engineering and Assets Maintenance Division under the direct supervision of **Engr. Tunde Bakare (Lead Systems Engineer)**. Amina was fully integrated into our operations and actively participated in several high-level tasks. Her core project involvements included thermodynamic system efficiency evaluations, preventive maintenance scheduling for rotating equipment, and auxiliary pipeline network integrity analyses.   

Amina demonstrated an outstanding work ethic, punctuality, and a strong commitment to our operational health, safety, and environmental (HSE) protocols. She displayed remarkable technical progress, showing a keen capability to translate theoretical engineering concepts into practical, field-level solutions. Her inquisitive nature, analytical mindset, and collaborative spirit made her an invaluable asset to the engineering team during her tenure.  

On behalf of the management and staff of Chevron Nigeria Limited, we commend her performance and believe that the hands-on experience she has acquired will prove highly beneficial to her final-year academic studies and future professional career. We wish her the very best in her academic and future endeavors.  

Please do not hesitate to contact the human resource department or the undersigned if you require further verification.  

Yours faithfully,  

[Signature]  

**Engr. Tunde Bakare**  
Lead Systems Engineer,  
Chevron Nigeria Limited.
documents.letterheadAddress: P.M.B. 65, Bosso Road, Minna, Niger State, Nigeria

researchTemplates.title: Model Baptist Church Attestation
researchTemplates.rawText:
FIRST BAPTIST CHURCH KADUNA
14 Baptist Way, Kaduna

June 10, 2026

To Whom It May Concern,

RECOMMENDATION AND ATTESTATION LETTER

This is to certify that the bearer, Brother Emmanuel Danjuma, has been a full communicant member in perfect standing since the year 2018. Over the years, he has contributed selflessly to the Evangelism ministry.

His integrity, Christian demeanor, and dedication to local community initiatives are highly exemplary. We wish him standard divine assistance in all administrative engagements.

Yours in His Vineyard,

Reverend Timothy Gari
Presiding Pastor
researchTemplates.structureAnalysis:
1. Standard Church Letterhead Header.
2. Date & Unified Title Structure bold, capitalized.
3. Opening attestation paragraph confirming membership dates.
4. Character feedback paragraph depicting church departments.
5. Professional signature block featuring the presiding clergyman.

researchTemplates.title: NLNG Internship/SIWES Clearance Model
researchTemplates.rawText:
NIGERIA LNG LIMITED
Plant Site, Bonny Island, Rivers State

May 29, 2026

LETTER OF DISCHARGE AND SIWES DISCHARGE CARD

To: The Coordinator, SIWES Office, University of Port Harcourt.

This is to certify that Mr. George Lawson (Matric: ENG/22/0890) has completed his Students Industrial Work Experience Scheme (SIWES) at our Operations Department.

The training ran from December 1st, 2025 to May 28th, 2026. He achieved full operations orientation and passed supervisor assessment with distinction.

Best Regards,

Engr. Victor Iniobong
Lead Coordinator, HR Training Division

1. Multi-national style header detailing Plant Site location.
2. Addressed directly to Academic SIWES Office.
3. Concise performance rating and confirmation of exact date boundaries.
4. Industry supervisor stamp designation details.

researchTemplates.title: Imo State Liaison Certificate Template
researchTemplates.rawText:
GOVERNMENT OF IMO STATE OF NIGERIA
(EASTERN HEARTLAND)

No: IM/LO/ABJ/2063

CERTIFICATE OF STATE OF ORIGIN

This is to certify that MR. ODEBIYE ADURAGBEMI ADEKUNLE whose photograph appears above hails from Oguta village in Oguta autonomous community in Oguta Local Government Area of Imo State of Nigeria.

This certificate of state of origin is an official document issued by the Imo State Liaison Office and is NOT TRANSFERABLE.

2. Aligned serial code and registration year.
3. Certifying clause with details of village, autonomous community, and LGA.
4. Traditional ruler declaration line.
5. Official Liaison office seal, restriction statement, and officer details.

systemPrompts.systemInstruction: You are DocMint, an expert, precision-oriented academic and administrative document generation assistant. You build beautiful, well-formatted letters following strict administrative conventions.
systemPrompts.pdfLetterheadInstructions: Ensure the document is structurally perfect. Output clean, gorgeous paragraphs.
